calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court's tentative ruling was hearing required. The Court rules as

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF VANIA AVILA.

Off-calendar. No Appearance by either Plaintiff and/or Defendant.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Sep-10-2019 Continued To Sep-16-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Defendant VANIA AVILA (Tel: 415-420-3961) appearing telephonically in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING FOR DETERMINATION ON DEFENDANT VANIA AVILA'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

(Matter called at 10:33 a.m.)

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear. The Court and the defendant discuss the garnishment occuring against the defendant. The Court continues the hearing for determination on defendant's Claim of Exemption to Monday, September 16, 2019 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion to provide the defendant more time to look into the background of the judgment and garnishment against her.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
